summary: Frontend-only testing of ReportBridge landing page + onboarding UX refactor (11-point improvement). All 10 test areas passed. Verified hero section, problem/solution/value sections, bottom CTA, demo banner, export helper text, upgrade hooks, upload guidance, and navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: NOTE: demo@reportbridge.io's seeded reports (_seed_demo) don't set is_demo=True — so demo banner only works for newly registered users (via _seed_new_user_demo). This is by design (pre-seeded account skips onboarding) but test 6 cannot be verified with the provided demo credentials alone. Tested with a new test user instead.
test_credentials: demo@reportbridge.io / demo1234 (pre-existing, has_seen_demo=True). testdemo_ui@test.com / test1234 (created for demo banner test)
seed_data_creation: Created testdemo_ui@test.com for demo banner verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 landing page + onboarding UX improvements confirmed working. Backend is 100% (iteration_4). demo@reportbridge.io now has 5 reports (3 created by test agents). Demo banner only shows for newly registered users.

test_results.TEST_1_LANDING_HERO: PASS - H1 correct, hero-cta to /signup, hero-demo-cta visible, trust text found
test_results.TEST_2_PROBLEM_SECTION: PASS - Dark terminal box with '→ Export CSVs from Meta / Google Ads' and '// ~3 hours every reporting cycle'
test_results.TEST_3_SOLUTION_SECTION: PASS - Steps 01/02/03 visible with correct titles, YOU GET box with checkmarks
test_results.TEST_4_VALUE_SECTION: PASS - '$20–$30 every time' and 'ReportBridge costs less than that per month' text found
test_results.TEST_5_BOTTOM_CTA: PASS - Dark bg section with heading, subtext, bottom-cta button
test_results.TEST_6_DEMO_BANNER: PASS - Verified with new test user: '👋 This is a demo report' and '2 minutes' in banner
test_results.TEST_7_EXPORT_HELPER: PASS - 'Send this report to your client in seconds' visible near Export PDF
test_results.TEST_8A_UPGRADE_BTN: PASS - upgrade-btn in workspace browser bar
test_results.TEST_8B_SIDEBAR_PLAN: PASS - Starter Plan text and sidebar-upgrade-link (Upgrade →) found
test_results.TEST_8C_DASHBOARD_PLAN_BANNER: PASS - plan-banner with Starter plan + upgrade-to-pro-btn on /app
test_results.TEST_8_REPORT_LIMIT_BANNER: PASS - report-limit-banner shown (demo user has 5 reports >= 3)
test_results.TEST_9_UPLOAD_GUIDANCE: PASS - 'Upload your ad platform CSV — Meta Ads, Google Ads...' in Step 2
test_results.TEST_10_NAVIGATION: PASS - How it works, Log in, Start free in nav; Sign up free in footer
